translation.aboutText: My name is Lucas Queirolo dos Santos, a software developer with a background in game development using Unity/C# and Godot/GDScript. I am currently pursuing a postgraduate degree in software engineering and expanding my work into different areas of development. I have experience working with RESTful API development, databases, web interfaces, and process automation.
translation.project1Text: Project created to put my front-end development knowledge into practice and showcase my skills, experience, and progress as a developer.
translation.project2Text: A game developed by the O Pão Game Studio team, where I worked as a game designer, programmer, and project manager. It received investment proposals and took me to Japan, to the Tokyo Game Show 2023, to showcase it. It is also available for sale on Steam!
translation.project3Text: This is my Itch.io page, where you can find some of the projects I have participated in over the years as a game developer. In each of them, I acted as a manager, game designer, and programmer.
translation.project4Text: A game developed in Unity Engine as a personal project with some colleagues. It is not yet finished, but it already delivers a good experience. I contributed to some game design decisions, but my main role was as a programmer.
translation.project5Text: Automation project developed for Banco BMG. The bot navigates a website, using spreadsheets to fill in and verify data, updating the necessary information in each spreadsheet and generating a log for each iteration.
translation.project6Text: Website developed with a colleague for Franco Gagnor, an aquarium store, based on a Figma design requested by the client.
translation.project7Text: Project developed during the Software Engineering postgraduate program. It consists of a RESTful API for media management built with Flask and FastAPI, using SQLite as the database, allowing CRUD operations to manage media information.
translation.experience1Text: I worked as a freelance software developer, providing services to Banco BMG through the company Exyon. I developed an automation bot for website navigation and spreadsheet manipulation, handling data reading, filling, and verification, with log generation for each iteration. I was also responsible for communicating with the contracting company and producing technical documentation for the project.
translation.experience2Text: I acted as a game designer and programmer at O Pão Game Studio, an indie game studio based in Rio de Janeiro. I took on multiple tasks and was primarily responsible for project management. Through the studio, I provided services to Legends of Learning, a U.S.-based educational platform, developing science and math games for children and teenagers. The main internal project was the game Growers, which received investment proposals through the Indie Hero program, was showcased in Japan at the Tokyo Game Show, and is currently available for sale on Itch.io and Steam.
translation.experience3Text: I was an assistant manager at Octopus Game Studio, an indie game studio in Rio de Janeiro. I was responsible for assisting in business decision-making, managing and supervising the team by relaying management requests, organizing events and classes offered by the studio, and assisting in budget management. In this role, I had the opportunity to refine my project and people management skills, as well as improve my communication and leadership abilities.
